_README.description: Model metadata for Anthropic's Claude API.
_README.usage: Models listed here are exposed directly through the Anthropic provider. Aliases are case-insensitive.

field_descriptions.model_name: The model identifier sent to the Anthropic API (e.g., 'claude-opus-4-6')
field_descriptions.aliases: Array of short names users can type instead of the full model name
field_descriptions.context_window: Total number of tokens the model can process (input + output combined)
field_descriptions.max_output_tokens: Maximum number of tokens the model can generate in a single response
field_descriptions.max_thinking_tokens: Maximum reasoning/thinking tokens the model will allocate when extended thinking is requested
field_descriptions.supports_extended_thinking: Whether the model supports extended reasoning tokens
field_descriptions.supports_json_mode: Whether the model can guarantee valid JSON output
field_descriptions.supports_function_calling: Whether the model supports function/tool calling
field_descriptions.supports_images: Whether the model can process images/visual input
field_descriptions.max_image_size_mb: Maximum total size in MB for all images combined
field_descriptions.supports_temperature: Whether the model accepts temperature parameter (note: temperature must be 1.0 when thinking is enabled)
field_descriptions.temperature_constraint: Type of temperature constraint: 'fixed' (fixed value), 'range' (continuous range), 'discrete' (specific values)
field_descriptions.intelligence_score: 1-20 human rating used as the primary signal for auto-mode model ordering
field_descriptions.allow_code_generation: Whether this model can generate and suggest fully working code

_generated.note: Do not edit by hand. Edit the overlay and rerun the sync.

models.description: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context, 128K output) - Most capable Claude model with adaptive thinking. No temperature support.
Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context, 128K output) - High intelligence Claude model with extended thinking
Claude Sonnet 4.6 (200K context, 64K output) - Balanced intelligence and speed with extended thinking
Claude Haiku 4.5 (200K context, 8K output) - Fast and cost-effective
RETIRED - Claude 3.5 Sonnet has been removed from the Anthropic API
RETIRED - Claude 3.5 Haiku has been removed from the Anthropic API
